_comment: This is a sample agent-generated operation patch for code-review.cop.json. Apply with: cop apply-op examples/code-review.cop.json examples/operation-patch.json

patch.value: The cache key does not include the user's organization ID (orgId), which may cause cross-tenant cache collisions when multiple organizations share user ID sequences.

operations.reason: Clarified the exact mechanism of the collision risk to help the reviewer understand the blast radius.
Marking as reasoned (agent-derived, not yet human-verified). Review status unchanged — still requires human sign-off.

comment.content: Please confirm whether user IDs are globally unique or only unique within an organization before marking this as verified.

operations.reason: Demonstrates add_comment operation for unresolved evidence questions.
